mapper.select:
SELECT h.id AS id, h.public_id::text AS publicKey, h.code, h.abbr, h.name, h.name_other AS nameKhmer, h.timezone, h.logo_file_name AS logoFileName, h.logo_file_type AS logoFileType, h.logo_file_size AS logoFileSize, CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(h.logo_path, '')), '') IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS logoAvailable, h.created_by AS createdById, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(uc.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(uc.last_name, ''))), ''), uc.username, '' ) AS createdBy, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(h.created_at, h.created), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI') AS created, h.modified_by AS modifiedById, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(um.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(um.last_name, ''))), ''), um.username, '' ) AS modifiedBy, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(h.modified_at, h.modified), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI') AS modified
FROM hospitals h LEFT JOIN users uc ON uc.id = h.created_by LEFT JOIN users um ON um.id = h.modified_by WHERE h.is_active = 1
AND ( h.name ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR h.code ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(h.abbr, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' )
ORDER BY h.id DESC LIMIT #{rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{page}

SELECT h.id AS id, h.public_id::text AS publicKey, h.code, h.abbr, h.name AS hospitalName, h.name_other AS nameInKhmer, h.timezone, h.logo_path AS logoPath, h.logo_file_name AS logoFileName, h.logo_file_type AS logoFileType, h.logo_file_size AS logoFileSize, CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(h.logo_path, '')), '') IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS logoAvailable FROM hospitals h WHERE h.is_active = 1 AND h.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT uh.user_id AS userId, u.public_id::text AS publicKey, TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))) AS userName FROM user_hospitals uh LEFT JOIN users u ON uh.user_id = u.id WHERE uh.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND uh.is_active = 1 AND u.is_active = 1

SELECT uh.user_id AS userId, u.public_id::text AS publicKey, COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.first_name, ''), ' ', COALESCE(u.last_name, ''))), ''), u.username, '' ) AS userName FROM user_hospitals uh INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = uh.user_id AND u.is_active = 1 WHERE uh.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND uh.is_active = 1;

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM hospitals WHERE is_active = 1 AND LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code})
AND id != #{excludeId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM hospitals WHERE is_active = 1 AND LOWER(abbr) = LOWER(#{abbr})
AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospitals ( code, abbr, name, name_other, timezone, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created, modified, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{abbr}, #{name}, #{nameOther}, COALESCE(#{timezone}, 'Asia/Phnom_Penh'), 1, #{createdBy}, #{modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE hospitals SET code = #{code}, abbr = #{abbr}, name = #{name}, name_other = #{nameOther}, timezone = #{timezone}, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE hospitals SET logo_path = #{logoPath}, logo_file_name = #{logoFileName}, logo_file_type = #{logoFileType}, logo_file_size = #{logoFileSize}, logo_updated_at = CASE WHEN #{logoPath} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE NOW() END, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW(), modified_by = #{modifiedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE user_hospitals SET is_active = 2, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW() WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_hospitals (user_id, hospital_id, is_default, is_active, created, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{hospitalId}, FALSE, 1, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, hospital_id) DO UPDATE SET is_active = 1, modified = NOW(), modified_at = NOW();
